title: SHADOWS HOUSE
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 (12). Manga ongoing (current ch. ~240). S1's final 2-3 episodes (the anime-only "Kidnapping" detour) diverge from the manga, and S2 compresses/skips material while staying broadly faithful; the combined anime settles back into the manga around Chapter 79, so chapter boundaries below are approximate.
